scope: latency fidelity only; correctness gate unchanged

calibration_source.note: Cycles are measured at complete Machine boundaries in behavioral RTL. The 1 ns period is a reporting assumption, not timing closure. MXFP M_MM_WO lacks BLEN architectural row-valid pulses and remains unsupported for cycle-exact validation.

unsupported_microbench_paths.policy: all rows conservatively become ready at backend idle
